untranslatable_reason: Signal requires PIN (Probability of Informed Trading) calculation and put-call ratio from option volumes (open-buy put volume / open-buy call volume). PIN is a proprietary microstructure metric requiring intraday trade classification not available in standard OHLCV indicators. Put-call ratio requires separate options market data. vol_ratio_20 used as imperfect proxy but does not capture the true put-call option volume logic or PIN computation specified in the source material.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally depends on options market microstructure data (put/call volumes) and a complex informed trading probability metric (PIN) that cannot be derived from standard price/volume indicators. The 43bps predictability edge and -61% correlation with size are empirical findings specific to PIN, which is not computable from OHLCV alone. Substituting vol_ratio_20 is a crude approximation only. Backtest engine would need PIN pre-calculated and options data integrated to properly implement this signal.
